subject: Exaggerated comedic male figure with wild hair and oversized panicked expression
description: A male humanoid figure is depicted in an extreme comedic close-up. The face dominates the frame: wide eyes, exaggerated expression of shock or panic, and wild spiky hair radiating outward in all directions. The figure's expression reads as theatrical over-reaction — large mouth, visible teeth, the body language of someone deeply alarmed or performing alarm. The overall visual register is pure comedy-relief despite the battle-card format. No weapon is visible.
foreground: face of a panicked male figure with wild hair and oversized comic expression
emotion: exaggerated panic or shock, theatrical alarm
